edits.why: Marcia's Group-A ruling (option b: rename): RESOLVED already names an approved `discourse_thread_state` (a status axis); no token has spanned status↔event, so the J03 proposition_kind is renamed AFFIRMED_RESOLVE to avoid the cross-axis collision while preserving the drafter's 'forward resolve, distinct from a vow or plain speech act' intent (2:4 'yet I will look again toward your holy temple'). AFFIRMED_RESOLVE promoted to proposition_kind under SC-0064 (J03 ruling log).
Marcia's arc_element rename ruling (2026-06-19, strip-to-type): dropped the narration-order _FIRST suffix; the type is RESCUE_DECLARED.
Marcia's arc_element rename ruling (2026-06-19): atomize the AND-compound to the prayer's hinge; banishment is carried by the descent beats. Renamed to TEMPLE_TURN.

Marcia's arc_element collapse ruling (2026-06-19): DESCENT_INTO_THE_DEEP + DESCENT_TO_THE_BOTTOM are one downward arc-movement (the staging stays in the scenes/propositions). Removed the merged-away value (DESCENT_INTO_THE_DEEP already present in this FM); DESCENT_TO_THE_BOTTOM not promoted.
